original_ad_name: Las Vegas Promo | V2 | Pattern page
primary_text:
Adventure awaits! When you buy 4 BFGoodrich KO3 tyres, you’ll enter to win a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Las Vegas 🎉

Whether it's for off-road excitement or highway durability, the KO3 tyres have you covered. And now, they might just take you all the way to Vegas!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Online tyre service — Rhonda
headline: Win A Trip to Las Vegas!
